vulnerabilities.title: Microsoft Defender
vulnerabilities.name: Microsoft Defender Insufficient Granularity of Access Control Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Microsoft Defender contains an insufficient granularity of access control vulnerability that could allow an authorized attacker to escalate privileges locally.
vulnerabilities.short_description: Microsoft Defender contains an insufficient granularity of access control vulnerability that could allow an...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
